rationale: PREM-LPP-001 version 0.1.5 is a schema-v3, Lesson Format v1 production pack at the frozen standard-risk candidate 4c9ed6b9317bc329bc2ea88ac36f61c145cf8fcf. The review head changes that pack only by adding the three counted artifacts. Each artifact validates, approves this exact identity and commit with no declared conflict or unresolved major/blocking finding, and has an active, exact structured GitHub COMMENT review by github:VSBDev pinned to the candidate: academic 4731771131, learning design 4731781271, and accessibility/rights 4731775884. Founding-stage self-operated COMMENT transport is allowed. The set supplies the required academic, learning-design, and accessibility-rights roles through three unique runs and three declared model families/providers (Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, and OpenAI GPT) under one accountable principal; the author run and this fresh adjudication run are different from every counted review run. Provenance is internally consistent self-attestation, not independent platform verification. The former worked-example traceability defect is resolved in the frozen candidate: claim-map-orientation-prerequisite-chain states the five-node route, maps only to scene-worked-example, appears in that scene's learner-visible source note, and resolves to a locator naming all five node records and four adjacent prerequisite links. The academic review's section 5.2 locator/claim-granularity concern and branch-tip citation-durability concern are credible but non-blocking minor preservation items: the instrumentation fact is correct and was verified in the candidate's canonical specification, is bounded in claim-map-route-resolution scope/uncertainty and exposed through the relevant scenes' source notes, while the candidate commit preserves the source state used for this review. Neither concern changes an answer, model, boundary, rights basis, or present source support. They remain public dissent for the next content revision; correcting references or claims now would stale all reviews. The record supports resolving sourceConfidence to high and promoting all six retained claims to reviewed. Subject only to the permitted governance transitions stated as conditions, quorum is satisfied and no credible unresolved blocker remains.
dissent: Academic minor: in a future content revision, add section 5.2 to the source locator and preferably represent the route-instrumentation boundary as its own claim; this is not a blocker for this candidate because the correct canonical source was verified and the boundary is carried in the mapped claim's scope/uncertainty.

Academic minor: in a future content revision, replace the branch-tip source URL with a tag/commit-pinned URL or archived URL for citation durability; the frozen candidate preserves the presently reviewed source state.
conditions: The maintainer must make only the policy-allowed governance transition: set lesson status to published, set sourceConfidence to high, and set every retained claim reviewStatus to reviewed; any other lesson or claims-ledger change stales this adjudication and all counted reviews.
After the governance-only transition and addition of this exact artifact, rerun deterministic validation, PR-readiness, and GitHub-provenance checks before merge.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev (accountable operator) — independent final adjudication agent
